add_executable(donner_svg_renderer_renderer_tool
  renderer_tool.cc
)
target_include_directories(donner_svg_renderer_renderer_tool PRIVATE ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR})
set_target_properties(donner_svg_renderer_renderer_tool PROPERTIES CXX_STANDARD 20 CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED YES)
target_compile_options(donner_svg_renderer_renderer_tool PRIVATE -fno-exceptions)
target_link_libraries(donner_svg_renderer_renderer_tool PRIVATE donner_base_failure_signal_handler donner_base_encoding_decompress donner_base_xml_xml donner_svg_svg_core donner_svg_parser_attribute_parser donner_svg_parser_parser donner_svg_parser_parser_details donner_svg_parser_parser_header donner_svg_renderer_renderer donner_svg_renderer_renderer_image_io donner_svg_renderer_renderer_interface)
